summary: Iteration 78: Visual Overhaul & Sora 2 Intro Video - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified including personalized dashboard, intro video player, pillar cards, cosmic mixer, and visual enhancements.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 78 verified the visual overhaul and Sora 2 intro video features: (1) GET /api/ai-visuals/intro-video returns status='ready' with video_url pointing to /api/static/videos/intro_cosmic_colle_5d909f40-2f6.mp4. (2) Video player modal opens correctly with autoPlay, mute toggle, and close button. (3) Personalized dashboard shows for logged-in users with: greeting, streak indicator, daily wisdom, action buttons (Quick Reset, Full Dashboard, Talk to Sage, My Journey), Continue section, New For You section, Progress stats. (4) Dashboard widgets have drag handles visible on hover using @dnd-kit. (5) Six pillar cards render correctly: Practice, Divination, Sanctuary, Nourish, Explore, Sage. (6) Cosmic Mixer floating widget visible for logged-in users with frequency, ambient sound, and mantra options. (7) Cosmic mesh gradient background visible. (8) Navigation bar works correctly.

backend_api.GET /api/dashboard/personalized (auth): ✓ Returns dashboard data with greeting, wisdom, progress

frontend_ui.Landing page loads: ✓ Hero section with breathing orb visible
frontend_ui.Video player modal: ✓ Opens with video element, close button, mute toggle
frontend_ui.Pillar cards (6): ✓ Practice, Divination, Sanctuary, Nourish, Explore, Sage all visible
frontend_ui.Dashboard action buttons: ✓ Quick Reset, Full Dashboard, Talk to Sage, My Journey all visible
frontend_ui.Progress stats: ✓ Shows Sessions, AI Conversations, Mood Entries, Journal Entries, Features Found, Streak Days
frontend_ui.Drag handles: ✓ Visible on hover for dashboard widgets
frontend_ui.Navigation bar: ✓ Practice, Divination, Sanctuary, Nourish, Explore all visible
frontend_ui.Cosmic Mixer: ✓ Floating button visible for logged-in users, panel opens with frequency/sound/mantra options
